title: PerfectCraft
body:
# PerfectCraft
## **_A 100% revisited minecraft_**

![A Perfect seed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c8219df18f7a42a2584b3128a036d129d0f81882.png)

## Rediscover the perfect Minecraft universe with this modpack

### This modpack is vanilla-like, it doesn't entirely change the look of minecraft.
## Minecraft if we were in 2.0

.✅ Distant horizon to see ever further

.✅ Completely Modified World Generation (Terralith + Tectonic, Geophilic, Immersive Weathering, better end and nether...)
 
.✅ Immersive third-person and first-person camera
 
.✅ Lot of building block and furniture
 
.✅ New structures vanilla-like (ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village, Yung's mods, Deeper and Darker...)

.✅ Exposure mod for take photos of every moment of life.
 
.✅ Ultra realistic atmosphere and rendering

.✅ Totally overhauled sound ambiance

.✅ Improve mobs intelligence

.✅ Optimized with Shaders like "Bliss"
[https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/bliss-shader](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/shaders/bliss-shader)

.✅ 220 Mods
